heading: Omitted
label: 883d Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the prescription of rules and regulations to carry out the provisions of former sections 883 to 883d of this title, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–586, § 586 Stat. 1296Oct. 27, 1972
